title: AI & Software Engineer
longDescription: Placeholder description — update with real details about the role at Prodigitality.

title: Co-Lead | Department of AI
description: Led hands-on ML workshops and designed AI curriculums for 50+ participants.
longDescription: Led and facilitated hands-on workshops including Python, Machine Learning fundamentals, and Langflow, helping 50+ participants build foundational machine learning and AI knowledge and skills.
Collaborated with the tech department team to design workshop content and improve learning outcomes through feedback.

title: R&D Intern – Computer Vision
description: Developed deep learning face-embedding models achieving 0.99+ AUC on HPC.
longDescription: Developed deep learning face-embedding models achieving 0.99+ AUC (ResNet-50, Vision Transformers with ArcFace loss) on standard benchmarks (VGGFace2, LFW, CPLFW) through computer vision pipelines using PyTorch, Torchvision, and scikit-learn on a single HPC GPU (A100, SLURM, Conda).
Delivered a comparative analysis of 5+ model architectures and validated results with ROC AUC and EER metrics across 10K+ tested pairs.
Ensured reproducibility through modular codebases, configuration files, and documentation for peer review.

title: Senior Data/ML Associate Committee
description: Facilitated ML study jams and mentored new developers in software engineering.
longDescription: Actively involved as a Senior Data/ML Associate in supporting various workshops and study jam lessons with machine learning topics under the Data/ML Team.
Facilitating sessions on Machine Learning Fundamentals through python and colab while engaging with the network of GDG Teams.
Former SME in the software development team, mentored new developers that facilitated their growth.

title: Frontend Freelance Developer
description: Implemented web designs and collaborated to create a graduate school alumni portal.
longDescription: Implementing web designs of core pages and components, including authentication (login/sign-up), settings, and main home pages, through Figma, React, and Tailwind while improving UX by analyzing user/client feedback.
Collaborated with a team of three developers to create a graduate school alumni portal website from scratch.

title: Chief Technology Officer & Co-founder
description: Co-founded a mental health startup, pitched at DICT 2022, and designed the UI/UX.
longDescription: Co-founded and led HinyApp, a mental health and wellness startup, and helped shape core support tools and resources to better serve students' well-being and engagement.
Pitched at the DICT 2022 Regional Pitching Competition in Palawan and gained mentorship from the Palawan International Technology Business Incubator.
Designed the app's UI in Figma, developed the prototype, and worked with the university's ICT office to refine features and ensure seamless integration.
